channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Loose paving slab trip hazard, 29th June
item.description:
Outside 147 Bermondsey St.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 147,149, Bermondsey Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree outside 57 & 59, 29th June
item.description:
A tree in this location was cut down about 14 years ago because my insurer said it was causing damage to my house. It was agreed that a new small tree would be planted instead. However this tree is now taller than the allowed 15feet. Can this be pruned please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Spencer Rise, Dartmouth Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover is damaged and rocking constantly, 29th June
item.description:
This manhole cover is rocking loudly day and night and is quite disruptive and loads. I have reported it previously, but it appears to not have been repaired.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clapham Common South Side, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Noisy loud loose dangerous manhole, 28th June
item.description:
This drain is loose it’s dangerous It’s so noisy it keeps you awake every time a car goes over it .in the day cars park over it for station so it’s quite as soon as they leave cars hit it .I have videos with sound it rocks when you cross the road it’s dangerous and when cars drive over it is ready to go lop sided and cause an accident

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sundridge Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bulk fly tip, 28th June
item.description:
Huge flytip of general rubbish and what seems to be a flat clearance, possibly from a short term let or air bnb business. Bulky items including a fridge, carpet, bed bases and mattresses, coffe table and broken down wardrobe and general waste. Its attracting rats, foxes and scavengers. Its disgusting. This is now a permanent hotspot along with many other spots in the near vicinity and borough wide. What are you doing about it Southwark Council ?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lucey Way, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tags on Boots Glass Windows, 28th June
item.description:
Tags on Boots Glass Windows Location: 51.46221244776131, -0.11492598825317223
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 449, Brixton Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged and dead branch overhanging parked car, 28th June
item.description:
I noticed that part of a healthy tree had a dead branch. When I looked closer I noticed that the branch is separated from the trunk (wind or lightning damage?). There are cars normally parked underneath so I am concerned that eventually it may fall during strong winds.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55, Broomfield Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping of general waste, 28th June
item.description:
Flytipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 179, Hamilton Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking fire access and garages, 28th June
item.description:
Fire access and 4 garages blocked.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed Vauxhall Astra dumped outside Spooner House, Barnfield Gardens, 28th June
item.description:
This car has been here months, not even parked in a valid spot. Keeps accruing parking tickets. No valid tax. Area is notorious for untaxed vehicles dumped by someone on the estate. Photos taken 28th June 2026.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnfield Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant litter on Kenninghall Road, 28th June
item.description:
There is a significant amount of litter on Kenninghall Road. This is particularly high near the London Tavern and shops next to it. This has been an ongoing problem.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kenninghall Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrowth on footpath, 28th June
item.description:
This pathway has not been maintained at all and is overgrown with trees, weeds, stinging nettles, and is making using this pathway quite treacherous. Please could the council maintain this pathway as its current state is inviting unwanted visitors and drug users. This has been untouched by the council for at least 8 months, but probably closer to a year. The issue is across the whole pathway but the exit onto the steps side (leading to Green Walk) is the worst.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Walk, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spillage, 28th June
item.description:
Charity shop donations/ rubbish spilled or left on street in area where bin bags are required to be left along the street, spilled into street and gets run over by cars

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trafalgar Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass in road, 28th June
item.description:
Vehicle accident on other side to IWM just before taxi bay, glass on road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Barkham Terrace, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builder has left landscaping waste on public road, 28th June
item.description:
Been here since 21st June. Several attempts to contact builder to get picked up. Builder originally promised to pick bag up on the 22nd but has not responded to direct messages. Outside 42 Moordown SE18 3nq

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Moordown, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Alleyway needs clearing, 28th June
item.description:
Leaves in alleyway that need clearing - we have a big community party this coming Sunday (5th July) and several elderly residents will be using the alleyway. Please can it therefore be cleared of leaves. Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norlands Crescent, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left after Sunday football, 28th June
item.description:
Haggerston School has a football academy every Sunday. Families parked in cars on Dunloe Street. It’s very social and the street is littered after. I’ve also complained to the school. Can we have council bins on the street, the school kids also litter.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dawson Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carpet underlay, planks of wood & general rubbish in recycle bags, 28th June
item.description:
Dumped on pavement near bin chamber, now increasing in size with pieces of furniture. Been like this for nearly two weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Whites Grounds, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 bin bags of garden waste, 28th June
item.description:
Bags have been there 5/7 days just dumped on pavenent
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakdene Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown grass and weeds, 28th June
item.description:
Very long grass and weeds, at the corner of Marion Crescent/ Sidmouth Road not been cut for months now, along with other roads in this area. Picture clearly shows grass and weeds across the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Sidmouth Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
